title: EU Cloud vs US Giants: A New European Cloud Option? #shorts
summary: Major cloud providers are expanding data centers across Europe. The video raises the question of whether Europe should build its own cloud infrastructure to reduce dependency on US giants and achieve digital sovereignty.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof notes that major cloud providers are expanding data centers across Europe, then asks whether Europe should build its own cloud infrastructure rather than rely on US giants. The framing centers on digital sovereignty: reducing dependency on non-European providers for core compute and storage. The concepts touched include virtualization and data centers, situating the sovereignty question in the underlying infrastructure rather than only policy.
